# Vue Jenga - 完整 API 文档

> 本文档包含 Vue Jenga 组件库的完整类型定义和 API 说明，适用于 AI 助手深度理解组件用法。

---

## 目录

1. [安装与初始化](#1-安装与初始化)
2. [类型工具](#2-类型工具)
3. [VjForm - 表单组件](#3-vjform---表单组件)
4. [VjTable - 表格组件](#4-vjtable---表格组件)
5. [VjModal - 弹窗组件](#5-vjmodal---弹窗组件)
6. [VjMenu - 菜单组件](#6-vjmenu---菜单组件)
7. [工具函数](#7-工具函数)

---

## 1. 安装与初始化

### 安装

```bash
npm install vue-jenga
# or
pnpm add vue-jenga
```

### 依赖要求

```json
{
  "vue": "^3.5.18",
  "element-plus": "^2.10.5",
  "pinia": "^3.0.3",
  "axios": "^1.11.0"
}
```

### 应用初始化

```ts
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import { createPinia } from 'pinia'
import { VjInit, useVjConfStore } from 'vue-jenga/utils'
import App from './App.vue'

const app = createApp(App)
const pinia = createPinia()
app.use(pinia)

// 初始化 Vue Jenga
VjInit({
  remEnable: true,          // 开启 rem 适配
  baseWidowWidth: 1920,     // 设计稿基准宽度
  baseFont: 40,             // 基准字体大小
  uploadFunc: async (options) => {
    // 全局上传函数
    return true
  }
})

app.mount('#app')
```

---

## 2. 类型工具

### 基础类型工具 (from 'vue-jenga/utils')

```ts
// 获取 Element Plus 组件的 Props 类型
type ElPropsType<T extends abstract new (...args: unknown[]) => any> = 
  InstanceType<T>["$props"]

// 获取 Element Plus 组件的 Events 类型
type ElEventType<T extends abstract new (...args: unknown[]) => any> = 
  Partial<Record<Parameters<InstanceType<T>["$emit"]>[0], (...args: unknown[]) => unknown>>

// 获取 Element Plus 组件的 v-model 类型
type ElModelType<T extends abstract new (...args: unknown[]) => any> = 
  InstanceType<T>["$props"]["modelValue"]
```

### 选项类型

```ts
type VjOptionItem<T = unknown, K = unknown> = {
  key?: string | number | symbol;
  label: string;
  value: T;
  disabled?: boolean;
  children?: VjOptionItem<T, K>[];
  isLeaf?: boolean;
  source?: K;
  [property: string]: unknown;
};

type VjOptions<T = unknown, K = unknown> = VjOptionItem<T, K>[];
```

---

## 3. VjForm - 表单组件

### 基础类型定义

```ts
// 表单 Props
interface VjFormProps {
  col?: number;                                    // 列数，默认 1
  form?: VjFormItemProps[];                        // 表单项配置数组
  elFormProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElForm>;       // ElForm 原生属性
  slots?: Slots;                                   // 透传插槽
  loading?: boolean;                               // 加载状态
  remerge?: (item: VjFormItemProps, index: number) => Partial<VjFormItemProps>; // 渲染前二次处理
}

// 表单项基础类型（所有表单项都继承此类型）
interface VjFormItemBase {
  type?: string;                                   // 表单项类型
  disableCheck?: boolean | ((props: VjFormItemProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => boolean); // 禁用检查
  defaultValue?: unknown | ((props: VjFormItemProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => unknown); // 默认值
  label?: string | ((item: VjFormItemProps) => string); // 标签
  code: string;                                    // 唯一编码（必填）
  required?: boolean;                              // 必填
  placeholder?: string;                            // placeholder
  noPlaceholder?: boolean;                         // 不显示 placeholder
  rules?: FormItemRule | FormItemRule[];          // 校验规则
  hide?: boolean | ((item: VjFormItemProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => boolean); // 隐藏控制
  onChange?: (value: unknown, item: VjFormItemProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => void; // 值变化回调
  
  noLabel?: boolean;                               // 隐藏 label
  
  // 布局相关
  spanPre?: number;                                // 前缀尺寸
  skPre?: string;                                  // 前缀插槽 key
  spanPost?: number;                               // 后缀尺寸
  skPost?: string;                                 // 后缀插槽 key
  skLabel?: string;                                // label 插槽 key
  
  colspan?: number;                                // 跨列
  rowspan?: number;                                // 跨行
  
  [x: string]: unknown;                            // 允许额外属性
}

// 父组件向子组件注入的附加参数
interface VjFormItemAttach {
  index: number;                                   // 在同一层级的序号
  forms: VjFormItemProps[];                        // 同一层级整个 form 的表单项配置
  labelMap: Record<string, string>;                // code 到 label 的映射
  model: Record<string, unknown>;                  // 当前表单数据
  rootModel: Record<string, unknown>;              // 根级表单数据（用于多级表单）
  addItemRule: (key: string, rule: VjFormItemProps) => FormRules; // 动态添加规则
  rmItemRule: (key: string) => FormRules;          // 动态移除规则
  addSubForm: (key: string, form: ElFormInsType) => Record<string, ElFormInsType>; // 添加子表单
  rmSubForm: (key: string) => Record<string, ElFormInsType>; // 移除子表单
  slots?: Slots;                                   // 透传插槽
  disabled?: boolean;                              // 禁用状态
  parentProps: VjFormPropsTotal;
}

// 表单作用域类型（用于插槽）
interface VjFormItemScope {
  _FormModel: Record<string, unknown>;             // 表单数据对象
  _ItemProps: Partial<VjFormItemPropsTotal> & Record<string, unknown>; // 当前项完整配置
  _code: string;                                   // 当前项 code
  _index: number;                                  // 当前项索引
  _forms: VjFormItemProps[];                       // 所有表单项配置
}
```

### 组件 Expose

```ts
interface VjFormExpose {
  forms: VjFormItemPropsTotal[];                   // 最终渲染的表单项列表
  validate: () => Promise<boolean>;                // 触发表单校验
  reset: () => void;                               // 重置表单值
  formRef: InstanceType<typeof ElForm>;           // ElForm 实例引用
  labelMap: Record<string, string>;                // code 到 label 的字典
  
  childRefs: VjFormItemExpose[];                   // 所有表单项实例
  childRefMap: Record<string, VjFormItemExpose>;   // 表单项实例 Map
  
  ruleCollect: Record<string, FormRules>;          // 所有规则集合
  addItemRule: (key: string, rule: VjFormItemProps) => FormRules;
  rmItemRule: (key: string) => FormRules;
}

interface VjFormItemExpose {
  formItemRef: InstanceType<typeof ElFormItem>;   // el-form-item 引用
  typeItemRef: unknown;                            // 具体子组件引用
  clearValidate: () => void;                       // 清除验证
  mergedProps: VjFormItemPropsTotal;               // 合并后的 props
}
```

---

### 3.1 Input 输入框 (type: 'input')

```ts
interface VjfInputProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'input';
  elInputProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElInput>;     // ElInput 参数
  elInputEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElInput>;      // ElInput 事件
  skPrefix?: string;                               // prefix 插槽
  skSuffix?: string;                               // suffix 插槽
  skPrepend?: string;                              // prepend 插槽
  skAppend?: string;                               // append 插槽
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '用户名',
  code: 'username',
  type: 'input',
  required: true,
  elInputProps: {
    maxlength: 20,
    showWordLimit: true,
    clearable: true
  }
}
```

---

### 3.2 Number 数字输入 (type: 'number')

```ts
interface VjfNumberProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'number';
  elNumberProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElInputNumber>; // ElInputNumber 参数
  elNumberEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElInputNumber>;  // ElInputNumber 事件
  skSuffix?: string;                                  // suffix 插槽
  wfull?: boolean;                                    // 是否占满容器宽度
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '年龄',
  code: 'age',
  type: 'number',
  elNumberProps: {
    min: 0,
    max: 150,
    precision: 0,
    step: 1
  }
}
```

---

### 3.3 Select 选择器 (type: 'select')

```ts
interface VjfSelectProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'select';
  options?: VjOptions | ((item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => VjOptions);
  elSelectProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElSelect> | ElPropsType<typeof ElSelectV2> | 
    ((item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => ElPropsType<typeof ElSelect> | ElPropsType<typeof ElSelectV2>);
  elSelectEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElSelect> | ElEventType<typeof ElSelectV2>;
  virtual?: boolean;                                 // 列表虚拟滚动
  
  // 值预处理
  onChangePrefix?: (options: VjOptions, value: unknown, item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => unknown;
  
  // 远程搜索
  remote?: boolean;                                  // 远程异步加载开关
  remoteFunc?: (params: {query: string}, item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<VjOptions>;
  remoteInitQuery?: boolean;                         // 初始化加载开关
  remoteInitOptions?: (item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model?: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<VjOptions>;
  remoteParamAttach?: Record<string, unknown> | ((item: VjfSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => Record<string, unknown>);
  
  // 插槽
  skDefault?: string;
  skHeader?: string;
  skFooter?: string;
  skEmpty?: string;
  skPrefix?: string;
  skLoading?: string;
  skTag?: string;
  skLabel?: string;
  skOptionDefault?: string;                          // option 的 default 插槽
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '城市',
  code: 'city',
  type: 'select',
  options: [
    { label: '北京', value: 'beijing' },
    { label: '上海', value: 'shanghai' }
  ],
  // 远程搜索
  remote: true,
  remoteFunc: async ({ query }) => {
    return await searchCities(query)
  }
}
```

---

### 3.4 Date 日期选择 (type: 'date')

```ts
interface VjfDateProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'date';
  elDateProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElDatePicker>;   // ElDatePicker 参数
  elDateEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElDatePicker>;    // ElDatePicker 事件
}
```

**快捷函数：**

```ts
import { VjfcDateRange, VjfcDatetime, VjfcDatetimeRange } from 'vue-jenga/form'

// 日期范围
VjfcDateRange({
  label: '日期范围',
  code: 'dateRange'
})

// 日期时间
VjfcDatetime({
  label: '日期时间',
  code: 'datetime'
})

// 日期时间范围
VjfcDatetimeRange({
  label: '日期时间范围',
  code: 'datetimeRange'
})
```

---

### 3.5 Time 时间选择 (type: 'time')

```ts
interface VjfTimeProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'time';
  elTimeProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElTimePicker>;   // ElTimePicker 参数
  elTimeEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElTimePicker>;    // ElTimePicker 事件
}
```

---

### 3.6 Radio 单选框 (type: 'radio')

```ts
interface VjfRadioOption extends VjOptionItem {
  elRadioProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElRadio>;       // ElRadio 参数
  elRadioEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElRadio>;        // ElRadio 事件
}

interface VjfRadioProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'radio';
  button?: boolean;                                  // 按钮模式
  options?: VjfRadioOption[] | ((item: VjfRadioProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => VjfRadioOption[]);
  elRadioProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElRadioGroup> | ((item: VjfRadioProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => ElPropsType<typeof ElRadioGroup>);
  elRadioEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElRadioGroup>;
  skOptionDefault?: string;                          // option 的 default 插槽
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '性别',
  code: 'gender',
  type: 'radio',
  button: true,  // 按钮样式
  options: [
    { label: '男', value: 1 },
    { label: '女', value: 2 }
  ]
}
```

---

### 3.7 Checkbox 复选框 (type: 'checkbox')

```ts
interface VjfCheckboxOption extends VjOptionItem {
  elCheckboxProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElCheckbox>; // ElCheckbox 参数
  elCheckboxEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElCheckbox>;  // ElCheckbox 事件
}

interface VjfCheckboxProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'checkbox';
  button?: boolean;                                  // 按钮模式
  options?: VjfCheckboxOption[] | ((item: VjfCheckboxProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => VjfCheckboxOption[]);
  allControl?: boolean;                              // 全选控制
  allText?: string;                                  // 全选文本
  elCheckboxProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElCheckboxGroup> | ((item: VjfCheckboxProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => ElPropsType<typeof ElCheckboxGroup>);
  elCheckboxEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElCheckboxGroup>;
  skOptionDefault?: string;                          // option 的 default 插槽
}
```

---

### 3.8 Switch 开关 (type: 'switch')

```ts
interface VjfSwitchProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'switch';
  elSwitchProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElSwitch>;     // ElSwitch 参数
  elSwitchEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElSwitch>;      // ElSwitch 事件
  skActiveAction?: string;                           // active-action 插槽
  skInactiveAction?: string;                         // inactive-action 插槽
}
```

---

### 3.9 Upload 文件上传 (type: 'upload')

```ts
interface VjfUploadProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'upload';
  elUploadProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElUpload>;     // ElUpload 参数
  elUploadEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElUpload>;      // ElUpload 事件
  initFunc?: (model: Record<string, unknown>, props: VjfUploadProps) => Promise<UploadUserFile[]>;  // 初始化文件列表
  uploadFunc?: (options: UploadRequestOptions) => Promise<boolean>; // 上传函数
  multiple?: boolean;                                // 多选
  limit?: number;                                    // 数量限制
  
  // 插槽
  skDefault?: string;
  skTip?: string;
  skTrigger?: string;
  skFile?: string;
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '附件',
  code: 'attachment',
  type: 'upload',
  multiple: true,
  limit: 5,
  uploadFunc: async (options) => {
    const result = await uploadFile(options.file)
    return result.success
  }
}
```

---

### 3.10 Cascader 级联选择 (type: 'cascader')

```ts
type ElCascaderLazyLoad = (node: CascaderNode, resolve: Resolve) => void;

interface VjfCascaderProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'cascader';
  options?: VjOptions<string | number>;              // 静态选项
  props?: CascaderProps;                             // El 的 cascader 参数
  lazyLoad?: ElCascaderLazyLoad;                     // 异步加载方法
  lazyLoadFunc?: (item: VjfCascaderPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => ElCascaderLazyLoad;
  elCascaderProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElCascader> | ElPropsType<typeof ElCascaderPanel>;
  elCascaderEmit?: Record<string, (...args: unknown[]) => unknown>;
  panel?: boolean;                                   // 非下拉模式
  lazy?: boolean;                                    // 开启异步加载节点
  
  // 插槽
  skDefault?: string;
  skHeader?: string;
  skFooter?: string;
  skEmpty?: string;
  skPrefix?: string;
  skSuggestionItem?: string;
  skTag?: string;
}
```

---

### 3.11 TreeSelect 树形选择 (type: 'treeselect')

```ts
interface VjfTreeSelectProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'treeselect';
  options?: VjOptions | ((item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => VjOptions);
  elTreeSelectProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElTreeSelect> | ((item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => ElPropsType<typeof ElTreeSelect>);
  elTreeSelectEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElTreeSelect>;
  onChangePrefix?: (options: VjOptions, value: unknown, item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => unknown;
  
  // 远程搜索（同 select）
  remote?: boolean;
  remoteFunc?: (params: {query: string}, item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<VjOptions>;
  remoteInitQuery?: boolean;
  remoteInitOptions?: (item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model?: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<VjOptions>;
  remoteParamAttach?: Record<string, unknown> | ((item: VjfTreeSelectPropsTotal, model: Record<string, unknown>) => Record<string, unknown>);
  
  // 插槽
  skDefault?: string;
  skHeader?: string;
  skFooter?: string;
  skEmpty?: string;
  skPrefix?: string;
  skLoading?: string;
  skTag?: string;
  skLabel?: string;
}
```

---

### 3.12 Sub 子表单 (type: 'sub')

```ts
interface VjfSubProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'sub';
  subFormConf?: VjFormProps | ((props: VjfSubPropsTotal, model: VjfSubModel) => VjFormProps);
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '子表单',
  code: 'subForm',
  type: 'sub',
  subFormConf: {
    form: [
      { label: '字段1', code: 'field1', required: true },
      { label: '字段2', code: 'field2' }
    ],
    col: 2
  }
}
```

---

### 3.13 Multi 动态多项 (type: 'multi')

```ts
interface VjfMultiProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'multi';
  multiItemConf: VjFormItemProps | ((props: VjfMultiPropsTotal, model: VjfMultiModel) => VjFormItemProps);
  multiItemDefaultValue: () => unknown;              // 设置每个子项的默认值
  onLengthChange?: (index: number, type: 'add' | 'del', scope: { props: VjfMultiPropsTotal; model: VjfMultiModel; }, attach?: unknown) => boolean;
  multiSpan?: number;                                // 按钮占位
}
```

**用法示例：**

```ts
{
  label: '联系方式',
  code: 'contacts',
  type: 'multi',
  multiItemConf: {
    label: '电话',
    code: 'phone',
    required: true,
    noLabel: true
  },
  multiItemDefaultValue: () => ({ phone: '' })
}
```

---

### 3.14 Custom 自定义 (type: 'custom')

```ts
interface VjfCustomProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'custom';
  skDefault?: string;                                // default 插槽
  formatter?: (value: unknown, item: VjFormItemProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => string; // 格式化函数
  className?: string;                                // CSS 样式类
}
```

**用法示例：**

```html
<VjForm v-model="formData" :form="formConfig">
  <template #myCustom="scope">
    <el-input v-model="scope._FormModel[scope._code]" />
  </template>
</VjForm>
```

```ts
{
  label: '自定义项',
  code: 'customField',
  type: 'custom',
  skDefault: 'myCustom'
}
```

---

### 3.15 Empty 空占位 (type: 'empty')

```ts
interface VjfEmptyProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'empty';
}
```

用于布局占位，不渲染任何表单控件。

---

### 3.16 Repeat 循环生成 (type: 'repeat')

```ts
interface VjfRepeatProps extends VjFormItemBase {
  type: 'repeat';
  repeatItems?: VjFormItemProps[] | ((props: VjfRepeatProps, model: Record<string, unknown>) => VjFormItemProps[]);
  repeatTime?: number;                               // 单项循环次数
}
```

---

## 4. VjTable - 表格组件

### 基础类型定义

```ts
interface VjTableProps<T = unknown> {
  data?: T[];                                        // 表格数据
  total?: number;                                    // 数据总数
  cloumns?: VjTableConfigItem[];                     // 列配置数组
  
  // 分页（双向绑定）
  pIndex?: number;                                   // 当前页码
  pSize?: number;                                    // 每页条数
  
  // ElTable 配置
  elProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElTable>;
  elEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElTable>;
  
  // 插槽
  skDefault?: string;                                // default 插槽 key
  skAppend?: string;                                 // append 插槽 key
  skEmpty?: string;                                  // empty 插槽 key
  slots?: Slots;
  
  // ElPagination 配置
  elPagiProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElPagination>;
  elPagiEmit?: Partial<Record<keyof PaginationEmits, (...args: unknown[]) => unknown>>;
  skPagiDefault?: string;                            // ElPagination 的 default 插槽 key
}

// 列基础类型
interface VjTableItemBase {
  prop?: string;                                     // 取值字段
  label: string;                                     // 标题
  elProps?: InstanceType<typeof ElTableColumn>["$props"]; // ElTableColumn 参数
  
  skDefault?: string;                                // default 插槽 key
  skHeader?: string;                                 // header 插槽 key
  slots?: Slots;
  
  pIndex?: number;
  pSize?: number;
  width?: string | number;                           // 宽度（rem 模式下数字单位为 10px）
  minWidth?: string | number;                        // 最小宽度（默认 100px）
  formatter?: (scope: ElTableScope & { _props: Record<string, unknown> }, value: unknown) => unknown;
  ellipsis?: boolean;                                // 超长省略
  fixed?: 'left' | 'right' | boolean;               // 固定列
}

// 作用域类型
interface ElTableScope {
  row: Record<string, unknown>;
  column: TableColumnCtx;
  $index: number;
}
```

### 列类型

```ts
// 索引列
type VjTableItemIndex = VjTableItemBase & {
  type?: 'index';
};

// 复选列
type VjTableItemSelect = VjTableItemBase & {
  type?: 'select';
};

// 展开列
type VjTableItemExpand = VjTableItemBase & {
  type?: 'expand';
};

// 值映射列
type VjTableItemMap = VjTableItemBase & {
  type?: 'map';
  map?: Record<string | number | symbol, string> | ((item: VjTableItemMap) => Record<string | number | symbol, string>);
  isArray?: boolean;                                 // 数组映射
};

// 注册子组件列
type VjTableItemReg = VjTableItemBase & {
  type: string;                                      // 注册的子组件标识符
  regProps?: Record<string, unknown>;               // 子组件 props
  regEmit?: Record<string, Function>;               // 子组件事件
};

// 多级表头
type VjTableItemParent = Partial<Omit<VjTableItemBase, 'prop'>> & {
  children?: VjTableConfigItem[];
};

type VjTableConfigItem = VjTableItemParent | VjTableItemChild;
```

### 完整示例

```ts
import { VjTable, type VjTableConfigItem, type VjTableProps, type ElTableScope } from 'vue-jenga/table'

const cloumns: VjTableConfigItem[] = [
  { type: 'select', width: 10, fixed: true },                    // 复选列
  { type: 'index', label: '序号', width: 10, fixed: true },      // 序号列
  { 
    type: 'expand', 
    label: '展开', 
    width: 10, 
    skDefault: 'expandTemplate',                                 // 展开内容插槽
    fixed: true 
  },
  { 
    label: '名称', 
    prop: 'name', 
    width: 20,
    formatter: (scope, value) => value?.toUpperCase()            // 格式化
  },
  { 
    label: '状态', 
    prop: 'status', 
    type: 'map', 
    map: { 0: '禁用', 1: '启用' },
    width: 15
  },
  {
    label: '操作',
    prop: 'action',
    skDefault: 'actionTemplate',                                  // 自定义操作列
    fixed: 'right',
    width: 20
  }
];

const tableProps: VjTableProps = {
  elPagiEmit: {
    change: (page: number) => loadData(page)                      // 分页切换
  }
};
```

---

## 5. VjModal - 弹窗组件

### VjModal

```ts
interface VjModalProps {
  title?: string;                                    // 标题
  width?: number | string;                           // 宽度
  cancelText?: string;                               // 取消按钮文本
  confirmText?: string;                              // 确定按钮文本
  confirmFunc?: (value?: unknown) => Promise<boolean>; // 确定点击函数（返回 true 关闭弹窗）
  confirmCheckFunc?: (value?: unknown) => Promise<boolean>; // 确定前校验
  showFunc?: (value: unknown) => Promise<boolean>;   // 弹窗展开后回调
  noFooter?: boolean;                                // 不显示下方按钮
  elDialogProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElDialog>;     // ElDialog 参数
  elDialogEmit?: ElEventType<typeof ElDialog>;      // ElDialog 事件
  slots?: Slots;
  skDefault?: string;                                // default 插槽
  skHeader?: string;                                 // header 插槽
}

// Expose
interface VjModalExpose {
  dialog: InstanceType<typeof ElDialog>;
  show: (value?: unknown) => void;                   // 显示弹窗
  dialogShow: boolean;                               // 弹窗显示状态
}
```

### VjModalForm

```ts
interface VjModalFormProps extends VjModalProps {
  formProps?: VjFormProps;                           // VjForm 配置
  skPre?: string;                                    // 表单前插槽
  skPost?: string;                                   // 表单后插槽
}
```

**用法示例：**

```html
<VjModalForm ref="modalRef" :formProps="formProps" />
<el-button @click="modalRef?.show()">打开</el-button>
```

```ts
import { VjModalForm, type VjModalFormProps, type VjFormProps } from 'vue-jenga/modal'

const modalRef = ref<InstanceType<typeof VjModalForm>>();

const formProps: VjFormProps = {
  form: [
    { label: '名称', code: 'name', required: true },
    { label: '数量', code: 'count', type: 'number', required: true }
  ],
  col: 1
};
```

---

## 6. VjMenu - 菜单组件

```ts
interface VjMenuItem {
  name: string;                                      // 菜单名
  path: string;                                      // 路由路径
  icon?: string;                                     // 图标
  group?: boolean;                                   // 分组
  elItemProps?: Partial<MenuItemProps>;             // ElMenuItem 参数
  elItemEmits?: Partial<MenuItemEmits>;             // ElMenuItem 事件
  elSubProps?: Partial<SubMenuProps>;               // ElSubMenu 参数
  children?: VjMenuItem[] | null;
}

interface VjMenuProps {
  elProps?: Partial<MenuProps>;                     // ElMenu 参数
  elEmits?: Partial<MenuEmits>;                     // ElMenu 事件
  menus: VjMenuItem[];                               // 菜单配置数组
  iconFunc?: (item: VjMenuItem) => string;          // 图标处理函数
}

// Expose
interface VjMenuExpose {
  elMenuRef: InstanceType<typeof ElMenu>;
}
```

**用法示例：**

```html
<VjMenu :menus="menuConfig" :el-props="{ router: true, defaultActive: '/home' }" />
```

```ts
const menuConfig: VjMenuItem[] = [
  { name: '首页', path: '/home', icon: 'HomeFilled' },
  { 
    name: '系统管理', 
    path: '/system', 
    icon: 'Setting',
    children: [
      { name: '用户管理', path: '/system/user' },
      { name: '角色管理', path: '/system/role' }
    ]
  }
];
```

---

## 7. 工具函数

### 7.1 请求工具

```ts
// 配置类型
interface VjRequestConf {
  interceptorRequest: (conf: InternalAxiosRequestConfig) => InternalAxiosRequestConfig;
  interceptorRequestErr: (err: unknown) => unknown;
  interceptorResponse: (res: AxiosResponse) => AxiosResponse;
  interceptorResponseErr: (err: unknown) => unknown;
  responseGlobalCheck: <T>(response: AxiosResponse<T>, options?: VjRequestOptions) => [true, T] | [false, unknown];
  globalErrorHandle: <T = unknown>(err: unknown) => Promise<T>;
}

type VjRequestOptions = AxiosRequestConfig & Record<string, unknown>;
```

**API：**

```ts
import { 
  VjRequestInit, 
  VjRequestInstance, 
  VjRequestSetConf, 
  VjRequestGetConf,
  VjGet, 
  VjPost, 
  VjPut, 
  VjDel 
} from 'vue-jenga/utils'

// 初始化
VjRequestInit({
  interceptorRequest: (config) => {
    config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
    return config
  },
  responseGlobalCheck: (response) => {
    if (response.data.code === 200) {
      return [true, response.data.data]
    }
    return [false, response.data.message]
  },
  globalErrorHandle: async (err) => {
    ElMessage.error(String(err))
    return Promise.reject(err)
  }
})

// 使用
const users = await VjGet<User[]>('/api/users', { status: 1 })
const user = await VjPost<User>('/api/users', { name: 'test' })
const updated = await VjPut<User>('/api/users/1', { name: 'updated' })
await VjDel('/api/users/1')
```

---

### 7.2 确认框工具

```ts
import { VjConfirm } from 'vue-jenga/utils'

const confirmed = await VjConfirm(
  '确认删除?',                    // 标题
  '删除后数据无法恢复',            // 消息内容（支持 string | VNode | (() => VNode)）
  async () => {                   // 确认回调
    await deleteItem()
    return true                   // 返回 true 关闭弹窗
  },
  {                             // ElMessageBoxOptions 可选
    confirmButtonText: '确认删除',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }
)
```

---

### 7.3 文件工具

```ts
import { VjDownFile, VjBlobToUrl, VjBlobToStr } from 'vue-jenga/utils'

// 下载文件
VjDownFile(
  blobData, 
  '报表.xlsx', 
  'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
)

// Blob 转 URL（图片预览等）
const imageUrl = VjBlobToUrl(blobData, 'image/png')

// Blob 转字符串
const text = await VjBlobToStr(blobData, 'utf-8')
```

---

### 7.4 全局配置 Store

```ts
import { useVjConfStore, type VjConf, type VjConfRegComp } from 'vue-jenga/utils'

const conf = useVjConfStore()

// 配置项
interface VjConf {
  remEnable: boolean;              // 是否开启 rem 适配
  baseWidowWidth: number;          // 设计稿基准宽度
  baseFont: number;                // 基准字体大小
  uploadFunc?: (options: UploadRequestOptions) => Promise<boolean>; // 全局上传函数
}

// 注册全局组件（用于 VjForm/VjTable 的自定义 type）
conf.repoReg([
  { type: 'my-input', comp: MyInputComponent },
  { type: 'my-table-cell', comp: MyTableCellComponent }
])

// 获取/清空注册组件
const comp = conf.repoGet('my-input')     // 获取单个
const allComps = conf.repoGet()            // 获取全部
conf.repoClear()                           // 清空

// rem 相关计算
const rootFont = conf.rootFont            // 计算后的根字体大小
const scaleRate = conf.scaleRate          // 缩放比例
const scaledNum = conf.getScaledNum(100)  // 根据比例计算数值
```

---

### 7.5 其他工具

```ts
import { 
  VjObjDeepMerge,      // 对象深度合并
  VjTreeEach,          // 树形遍历
  VjFlatToTree,        // 扁平转树
  VjTreeToFlat,        // 树转扁平
  VjClone,             // 深拷贝
  VjIsEmpty,           // 判断是否为空
  VjSleep,             // 睡眠等待
  VjUid,               // 生成唯一 ID
  VjDebounce,          // 防抖
  VjThrottle           // 节流
} from 'vue-jenga/utils'
```

---

## 8. 其他组件

### VjFoldLink - 折叠链接

用于表格操作列的链接折叠展示。

```ts
import { VjFoldLink, type VjFoldLinkItem, type VjFoldLinkProps } from 'vue-jenga/other'

interface VjFoldLinkItem {
  label: string;                                     // 链接名
  func?: (scope: ElTableScope | undefined, item: VjFoldLinkItem) => void;
  hide?: boolean | ((item: VjFoldLinkItem, scope?: ElTableScope) => boolean);
  loading?: boolean;
  elLinkProps?: ElPropsType<typeof ElLink>;
}

interface VjFoldLinkProps {
  tableScope?: ElTableScope;
  num?: number;                                      // 显示几个（包括"更多"）
  links?: VjFoldLinkItem[];
  slots?: Slots;
  skDefault?: string;
  skMore?: string;
}
```

**在 VjTable 中使用：**

```ts
{
  label: '操作',
  prop: 'action',
  type: 'fold-link',                                 // 注册在 VjConf 中的类型
  width: 30,
  regProps: {
    links: [
      { label: '编辑', func: (scope) => handleEdit(scope) },
      { label: '删除', func: (scope) => handleDelete(scope) },
      // ... 更多链接，超出 num 会折叠
    ],
    num: 3
  }
}
```

---

## 附录：完整类型导入速查

```ts
// Form 相关
import { 
  VjForm, 
  VjfcTextarea, VjfcDateRange, VjfcDatetime, VjfcDatetimeRange, VjfcSelectMulti,
  type VjFormProps, 
  type VjFormItemProps, 
  type VjFormItemBase,
  type VjFormItemAttach,
  type VjFormItemScope,
  type VjfInputProps,
  type VjfNumberProps,
  type VjfSelectProps,
  type VjfDateProps,
  type VjfTimeProps,
  type VjfRadioProps,
  type VjfCheckboxProps,
  type VjfSwitchProps,
  type VjfUploadProps,
  type VjfCascaderProps,
  type VjfTreeSelectProps,
  type VjfSubProps,
  type VjfMultiProps,
  type VjfCustomProps,
  type VjfEmptyProps,
  type VjfRepeatProps
} from 'vue-jenga/form'

// Table 相关
import { 
  VjTable, 
  type VjTableProps, 
  type VjTableConfigItem, 
  type VjTableItemBase,
  type ElTableScope 
} from 'vue-jenga/table'

// Modal 相关
import { 
  VjModal, 
  VjModalForm, 
  type VjModalProps, 
  type VjModalFormProps 
} from 'vue-jenga/modal'

// Menu 相关
import { 
  VjMenu, 
  type VjMenuProps, 
  type VjMenuItem 
} from 'vue-jenga/menu'

// 工具相关
import { 
  VjInit,
  useVjConfStore,
  VjRequestInit, VjGet, VjPost, VjPut, VjDel,
  VjConfirm,
  VjDownFile, VjBlobToUrl, VjBlobToStr,
  type VjConf,
  type VjRequestConf,
  type ElPropsType,
  type ElEventType,
  type ElModelType,
  type VjOptions,
  type VjOptionItem
} from 'vue-jenga/utils'

// 其他组件
import { 
  VjFoldLink, 
  type VjFoldLinkProps, 
  type VjFoldLinkItem 
} from 'vue-jenga/other'
```

---

*本文档包含 Vue Jenga v0.2.2 的完整 API 定义*
